# FreeType upstream source

- Version: 2.14.3
- Archive: <https://download.savannah.gnu.org/releases/freetype/freetype-2.14.3.tar.xz>
- SHA-256: `36bc4f1cc413335368ee656c42afca65c5a3987e8768cc28cf11ba775e785a5f`

The repository keeps the public headers plus the base, SFNT, TrueType, CFF,
PostScript helper/hinter/name, smooth-raster, and auto-hinter source directories.
`nmarkdown/ft2build.h`, `nmarkdown_ftmodule.h`, and
`nmarkdown_ftoption.h` define the smaller calculator build; compressed streams,
bitmap strikes, color layers, SVG, Mac resource forks, and unused name services
are disabled.
